'''Sheebla''' was a [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] warrior-woman who was the true love of [[George R. Binks]]. Unfortunately, as she was infertile, he forced himself to marry [[Jar Jar Binks's mother|another woman]], as an heir was more important to him than love.

After living with his [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|only child]] for some time, however, George decided he had made the wrong choice.

==Appearances==
*{{Tales|20|George R. Binks}} {{1st}} {{Flash}}
